zh.lifeSummary: Athellred Agnes Flournoy於1579年出生在英國肯特坎特布瑞。她於1610年與Thomas Farrar在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1650年3月30日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利。

nameMeanings.name: Flournoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Flournois: derivative of Old French flour ‘flour’ and noix ‘nut’, apparently a nickname for someone who used nut flour. The surname Flournois is no longer found in France.

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with the variant Flourney) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Athellred Agnes Flournoy was born in 1579, in Canterbury, Kent, England. She married Thomas Farrar in 1610, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 30 March 1650, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.St Peter's Church, Burnley, Lancashire,: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Athellred Agnes Flournoy(은)는 1579년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에서 Thomas Farrar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1650년 3월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Athellred Agnes Flournoy родилась в 1579 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Farrar в 1610 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 30 марта 1650 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
